nasb.text: Just as it is written, “For Your sake we are being put to death all day long; We were considered as sheep to be slaughtered.”

esv.text: As it is written, “For your sake we are being killed all the day long; we are regarded as sheep to be slaughtered.”

cnv.text: 正如經上所記： “為你的緣故，我們終日面對死亡， 人看我們像待宰的羊。”

ccb.text: 正如圣经上说：“为了你，我们终日出生入死，被视为待宰的羊。”

csbs.text: 正如经上所记： “为你的缘故，我们终日被置于死地， 被看为要宰杀的羊。”
